creator: loic-freebsd@uzea.eu
text:
Created attachment 198098
patch for net/ipdecap-0.7.2 update

Hello,

Update to the latest upstream version 0.7.2 (I am the original author and port maintainer).

This will also fix the current build failure of the current port version 0.7.1 https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=232144

I had to add some patches for that, but I'll fix that upstream for the next release.

Testing:
* portlint -A
* poudriere with 11.2-RELEASE/10.4-RELEASE

Patch generated with diff -ruN
